prompt: Generate a set of icons. Use the minimal outline style from image 2. The icons should depict information graphics concepts like those in image 1. Incorporate the two-color palette seen in image 1 (blue/dark blue).
prompt_refined: Generate a set of icons. Each icon should adopt the minimalist outline style characterized by thin, clean lines, similar to the aesthetic seen in image 2. The icons must represent various information graphics concepts, drawing inspiration from the themes and subjects illustrated in image 1 (e.g., data analytics, servers, cloud computing, networking, data charts). Crucially, the icons should exclusively utilize the two-tone blue color palette prominently featured in image 1, with one shade of blue used for the primary outlines and the other for subtle internal details or accents, ensuring the overall aesthetic remains predominantly line-based.
objects: All icons rendered in a minimalist outline style
All icons utilizing thin, clean lines
All icons exclusively using a two-tone blue color palette
One shade of blue used for primary outlines, the other for subtle internal details or accents
